testcase.name: invaliduser

error.message:
element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (1282, 37). Other element would receive the click:
...

testcase.name: invalidpassword

error.message: unexpected alert open: {Alert text : Wrong password.} (Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.57): Wrong password. Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.7' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [c161a66eb8712741336e5e02dad1d5b6, findElement {value=nameofuser, using=id}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.57, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.57 (b4f28b5637d0..., userDataDir: C:\Users\SOWNDA~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:56778}, goog:processID: 20092, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:56778/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.57, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: c161a66eb8712741336e5e02dad1d5b6
